name: Token
description: Small inline element for discrete associated data — tags, categories, active filters. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx Token): 11-color vocabulary with size scale; removal and click behavior are a declared boundary. v1.1.0: the size scale is LIVE via tokensByProp (it was declared but bound to fixed tokens — a dead prop): md keeps the original rendering; sm tightens padding-inline to {space.inset-y.sm} (4px — cross-axis reuse, the Switch/List precedent; no smaller inset-x token exists, and no font token below 12px exists so sm keeps the base font); lg steps font to {font.control.size.sm} and padding to {space.inset-x.sm}/{space.inset-y.sm}. Existing repo tokens only — nothing minted.

slots.description: Content after the label — a count Badge, a chevron.
